recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

recommendations.title: Kitchen with Apartment
recommendations.overview: Jacques and Martine, an ordinary bourgeois couple, invite to dinner a friend whom they have not seen the last ten years. Since then he has become a media star and everything has to go just right at dinner.

recommendations.title: The Banana Splits Movie
recommendations.overview: A boy named Harley and his family attend a taping of The Banana Splits TV show, which is supposed to be a fun-filled birthday for young Harley and business as usual for Rebecca, the producer of the series. But things take an unexpected turn - and the

recommendations.title: The D Train
recommendations.overview: With his 20th reunion looming, Dan can’t shake his high school insecurities. In a misguided mission to prove he’s changed, Dan rekindles a friendship with the popular guy from his class and is left scrambling to protect more than just his reputation

recommendations.title: Eddie Murphy Raw
recommendations.overview: Eddie Murphy delights, shocks and entertains with dead-on celebrity impersonations, observations on '80s love, sex and marriage, a remembrance of Mom's hamburgers and much more.

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect
recommendations.overview: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: Catfight
recommendations.overview: The rivalry between two former college friends comes to a head when they both attend the same glamorous event.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Cook Up a Storm
recommendations.overview: An international culinary competition becomes a battleground between rival cooks, one famous for his Cantonese street food and the other a Michelin-starred chef trained in France. But their rivalry takes an unexpected turn when they discover a common
